Answer Engineering public package.

Purpose:
    Expose the narrow stable import surface used by external callers and downstream packages.

Architectural role:
    Public package boundary for generation runtime entrypoints and the compiled rules contract used in notebook-level workflows.

Exports:
    Only symbols intentionally designated as downstream-consumable contracts are re-exported here.

Boundary note:
    This root surface is intentionally small to provide one canonical import path while keeping internal module layout private.
